title: Winner of Fiddle Raffle
excerpt: ​Congratulations to Jan Holden with ticket #0510 of Stonewall, MB, winner of our Fiddle Raffle. The draw took place on September 17, 2016 in Portage la Prairie.
bodyHtml: ​Congratulations to Jan Holden with ticket #0510 of Stonewall, MB, winner of our Fiddle Raffle. The draw took place on September 17, 2016 in Portage la Prairie.
